---
description: Break a PRD or decision doc into independently-buildable vertical-slice work items.
mode: agent
---

Full workflow (canonical): `.claude/skills/to-issues/SKILL.md` — read it and follow it.

Slice by outcome, not by layer. Order by dependency. No issue tracker/GitHub remote is wired up yet — output a checklist doc saved alongside the source PRD/decision, not real issues, unless the user confirms a remote exists and wants real issues created.
